---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Understudy
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of the problem. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Which layer does this relate to?**
- [ ] Layer 1: GUI / software operation
- [ ] Layer 2: Teach / demonstration learning
- [ ] Layer 3: Memory / skills
- [ ] Layer 4: Route optimization
- [ ] Layer 5: Proactive autonomy
- [ ] Infrastructure (gateway, channels, CLI)
- [ ] Other

**Additional context**
Any other context, screenshots, or examples.
